movie.overview: In Prohibition-era Chicago, musicians Joe and Jerry witness a mob hit, and flee the state in an all-female band disguised as Josephine and Daphne, but further complications set in.
movie.tagline: The movie too HOT for words!
movie.title: Some Like It Hot
